volumeTitle: Trojan Women. Iphigenia among the Taurians. Ion
label: Iphigenia among the Taurians (Section 1490 - Section 1497a)

sections.label: Section 1490
sections.translation: Go with good fortune , blessed in having your portion of safety .

sections.label: Section 1493
sections.translation: Pallas Athena , holy among immortals and mortals , we will do as you command .

sections.label: Section 1495
sections.translation: For we receive your voice in our ears with great and unexpected pleasure .

sections.label: Section 1497a
sections.original: ὦ μέγα σεμνὴ Νίκη , τὸν ἐμὸν
sections.translation: Greatly revered Victory , may you occupy my life and never cease to crown me !
